2606.14117.title: A Two-Stage Statistical Framework for Evaluating Associative Interference in Large Language Models
2606.14117.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly evaluated for bias using adaptations of human psychological paradigms, yet methodological limitations-particularly the conflation of refusal behavior with task performance-have hindered clear interpretation. Here, we adapt the Implicit Association Test (IAT) to a controlled, forced-choice framework and introduce a two-stage modeling approach that separates response compliance from task-consistent classification. Across three contemporary LLMs (Claude Sonnet-4, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and GPT-5), we evaluate associative interference, defined as reduced task-consistency in incongruent relative to congruent conditions. While compliance with the structured response format was uniformly high, interference effects varied substantially across models and domains. Claude Sonnet-4 exhibited strong interference in the Gender--Career domain (DeltaP = 0.086, 95% CrI [0.026, 0.173]) and smaller but credible effects in Gender--Science. Gemini 2.5 Pro showed attenuated interference, and GPT-5 exhibited minimal or no detectable interference across domains. These findings demonstrate that IAT-style associative asymmetries are not a universal property of LLMs, but instead depend on model-specific characteristics. By isolating interference from compliance and modeling item-level variability, this study provides a principled framework for evaluating structured response patterns in LLMs. The results highlight the importance of model-specific assessment and suggest that associative interference can be substantially mitigated in modern systems.
2606.14117.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地使用人類心理學範式的改編來評估偏見，然而方法論的限制——特別是將拒絕行為與任務表現混為一談——阻礙了清晰的解釋。在這裡，我們將隱性聯想測試（IAT）調整為一個受控的強制選擇框架，並引入一種兩階段建模方法，將響應合規性與任務一致性分類分開。在三個當代LLM（Claude Sonnet-4、Gemini 2.5 Pro 和 GPT-5）中，我們評估了聯想干擾，定義為在不一致條件下的任務一致性降低，相對於一致條件。儘管對結構化響應格式的合規性普遍較高，但干擾效應在模型和領域之間變化顯著。Claude Sonnet-4 在性別-職業領域顯示出強烈的干擾（DeltaP = 0.086, 95% CrI [0.026, 0.173]），在性別-科學上則顯示出較小但可信的效應。Gemini 2.5 Pro 顯示出減弱的干擾，而 GPT-5 在各個領域中幾乎沒有或無法檢測到干擾。這些發現表明，IAT風格的聯想不對稱並不是LLM的普遍特性，而是依賴於模型特定的特徵。通過將干擾與合規性隔離並建模項目級變異性，本研究提供了一個原則性框架，用於評估LLM中的結構化響應模式。結果突顯了模型特定評估的重要性，並表明聯想干擾在現代系統中可以顯著減輕。
2606.14117.author: Achraf Cohen et.al.
